tags.name: `mc-loading-indicator`
tags.description:
Purpose: Indicate that a process is ongoing or loading.
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: When you need to show that something is loading or processing.
When not to use: When you need to show static content or completed states.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-drawer, mc-input, mc-modal, mc-tab
Alternative component names: Spinner, Loader, Progress Indicator

Attributes:

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only

  * `arialabel` {`string`} - Extra aria-label that should be used for accessibility purposes.
If not provided, the `label` property will be used as `aria-label`

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the loading indicator
Can be: `bar`, `ring`

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the loading indicator.

  * `appearance` {LoadingIndicatorAppearance} - Appearance of the loading indicator.
Can be: `primary`, `neutral-inverse`

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the loading indicator.
Can be: `horizontal`, `vertical`

Properties:

  * `ringSize` {`number`} - 

  * `ringRadius` {`number`} - 

  * `ringDash` {`number`} - 

  * `ringStrokeDasharray` {`string`} - 

  * `ringStrokeDashoffset` {`string`} - 

  * `ringTransform` {`string`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only

  * `arialabel` {`string`} - Extra aria-label that should be used for accessibility purposes.
If not provided, the `label` property will be used as `aria-label`

  * `variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the loading indicator
Can be: `bar`, `ring`

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the loading indicator.

  * `appearance` {LoadingIndicatorAppearance} - Appearance of the loading indicator.
Can be: `primary`, `neutral-inverse`

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the loading indicator.
Can be: `horizontal`, `vertical`

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
`label` {`string`} - Label has to be passed as a property.
It is required attribute as it will be used as `aria-label`

Property: label

Default: Loading

attributes.name: hiddenlabel
attributes.description:
`hiddenlabel` {`boolean`} - If set to `true` or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only

Property: hiddenlabel

Default: false

attributes.name: arialabel
attributes.description:
`arialabel` {`string`} - Extra aria-label that should be used for accessibility purposes.
If not provided, the `label` property will be used as `aria-label`

Property: arialabel

Default:

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description:
`variant` {`Variant`} - Variant of the loading indicator
Can be: `bar`, `ring`

Property: variant

Default: ring

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the loading indicator.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description:
`appearance` {LoadingIndicatorAppearance} - Appearance of the loading indicator.
Can be: `primary`, `neutral-inverse`

Property: appearance

Default: primary

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
`orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the loading indicator.
Can be: `horizontal`, `vertical`

Property: orientation

Default: vertical
